plainMeaning: A ZUS form: the application for sickness benefit (wniosek o zasiłek chorobowy), used mainly by people applying to ZUS directly rather than through an employer — for example the self-employed, or situations after insurance has ended (often alongside the Z-10 statement). It's a different document from the e-ZLA sick note a doctor issues, and from the Z-3 certificate an employer submits for most employees instead. Whether it applies to a specific situation is for ZUS to confirm.
